Off Calendar May-22-2023 Continued To Jun-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kale Heiman appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court stated that it looks like the path here is to take the petition for final distribution that was filed by the deceased administrator off calendar, and grant the petition for letters of administration. Mrs. Heiman agrees. The court noted that no one is here to object. Discussion was held regarding the requirement of Mrs. Heiman's client to file a waiver of accounting, or a final accounting. The court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Ezio Gagliardi is appointed as the successor administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for March 25, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a final accounting, or a waiver of accounting for the deceased administrator is set for May 22, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney, III remains as the probate referee. The First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
